prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: DOY-GEOKIT-PARENT Product Type: HAMMER_MALLET Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Geology Rock Hounding Kit with Mining Tools and Carry Bag Description: If rockhounding, gem mining, or fossils are a new hobby or interest, you’ll need the right tools to set yourself up for success in the field. From breaking up deposits to cleaning and examining materials, this ASR Outdoor rockhounding tools kit has you covered with this geology kit for your rock and gem hunting needs including the perfect bag to store and carry your mining and geology equipment like rock pick hammers, brushes, mini sifters, folding shovels, and more.

Once you’ve made a mess in the field, you’re going to need to sort, examine and tidy up any newfound materials; this kit includes a mini steel wire mesh classifier to screen off larger unwanted raw materials, examination brushes, and a snifter bottle for more detailed cleaning work, plastic baggies and a magnification jewelers loupe.

The ASR Outdoor rock hounding bag features double-stitching at all stress points to ensure that it will last through years of prospecting or camping trips. It’s made of high-quality nylon that is naturally weather-resistant so you can count on it to protect your tools and supplies rain or shine. It has plenty of pockets and features quick-release buckles so you can access your tools quickly and easily.

Whether you’re on the hunt for emeralds in North Carolina, jade in Big Sur, California, or fossils in Wyoming, this rockhounding kit from ASR Outdoor will have you organized and prepared for your next mineral mining adventure. Good luck! Search Terms: rock hounding kit; rockhounding kit; rock hounding equipment; geology tools Features: - DELUXE ROCKHOUNDING TOOLS KIT: If rockhounding, gem mining or fossils are a new hobby or interest, you’ll need the right tools to set yourself up for success in the field! From breaking up deposits to cleaning and examining materials, this ASR Outdoor rockhounding tools kit has you covered - ESSENTIAL ROCK PICK: A must have, this 20oz hammer features rubberized grip for shock reduction; 11 inches in length and forged from one piece of steel, one side features a square face for hammering rock or driving chisels, while the opposing pointed tip allows you to crack open rocks or hard, dense material - ROCKHOUNDING ACCESSORIES: Once you’ve made a mess in the field, you’re going to need to sort, examine and tidy up any new found materials; this kit includes a mini steel wire mesh classifier to screen off larger unwanted raw materials, examination brushes and a snifter bottle for more detailed cleaning work, plastic baggies and a magnification jewelers loupe - DELUXE ASR BAG: The deluxe nylon tool bag makes it easy to carry all your rockhounding tools to and from your field site, keeping everything organized; the tool bag features convenient side pockets, a durable lower compartment and large middle compartment - MULTIPLE KIT OPTIONS: Choose the right kit for your rock hounding needs and experience. Whether you're a novice or an expert we've got you covered so you can get out there and ROCK ON === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Geology Rock Hounding Kit with Mining Tools
